meaning: n.迪拉姆(摩洛哥、阿联酋、埃及等国之货币单位)
examples: At the Two-Dirham Plaza nearby, many items now sell for five.
The company’s individual contractors and suppliers, who have suffered silently but deeply in this crisis, will soon get a cash payment of up to 500,000 dirham ($136,000).
The basic salary of weak electrician is 2700 Dirham each month; the unskilled laborer is 2200 Dirham each month. The bonus will depend on the quantity and quality of finished works.
Prices start from around 650 UAE Dirham for a midrange studio apartment but drop significantly the longer you rent them.
If you're looking for low risk and solid returns, steer clear of local currencies like the Saudi riyal or the UAE dirham.
